mapper.select:
SELECT -- 全部物品成本 ROUND(SUM(price), 2) AS allPrice,
-- 日均成本 ROUND(SUM( CASE WHEN use_by_times = 1 AND usage_num > 0 THEN (price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0)) / usage_num WHEN use_by_times = 1 AND (usage_num = 0 OR usage_num IS NULL) THEN price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0) WHEN use_by_times = 0 THEN (price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0)) / (DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), purchase_date) + 1) ELSE 0 END ), 2) AS allDailyPrice,
-- 在役物品成本 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS activePrice,
-- 在役物品日均成本 ROUND(SUM( CASE WHEN status = 1 AND use_by_times = 1 AND usage_num > 0 THEN (price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0)) / usage_num WHEN status = 1 AND use_by_times = 1 AND (usage_num = 0 OR usage_num IS NULL) THEN price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0) WHEN status = 1 AND use_by_times = 0 THEN (price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0)) / (DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), purchase_date) + 1) ELSE 0 END ), 2) AS activeDailyPrice FROM fortune_goods_keeper WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT -- 全部物品成本 ROUND(SUM(price), 2) AS allPrice,
-- 日均成本 ROUND(SUM( CASE WHEN use_by_times = 1 AND usage_num > 0 THEN (price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0)) / usage_num WHEN use_by_times = 1 AND (usage_num = 0 OR usage_num IS NULL) THEN price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0) WHEN use_by_times = 0 THEN (price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0)) / (CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(purchase_date) AS INTEGER) + 1) ELSE 0 END ), 2) AS allDailyPrice,
-- 在役物品成本 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS activePrice,
-- 在役物品日均成本 ROUND(SUM( CASE WHEN status = 1 AND use_by_times = 1 AND usage_num > 0 THEN (price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0)) / usage_num WHEN status = 1 AND use_by_times = 1 AND (usage_num = 0 OR usage_num IS NULL) THEN price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0) WHEN status = 1 AND use_by_times = 0 THEN (price - COALESCE(sold_price, 0)) / (CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(purchase_date) AS INTEGER) + 1) ELSE 0 END ), 2) AS activeDailyPrice FROM fortune_goods_keeper WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND deleted = 0
